fields.skills: Skills (technical or soft — used to match jobs, partnerships & community roles)

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to see jobs, partnerships, and community roles matched to you.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.sentBody: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a link to reset your password. It expires in 1 hour.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Make it at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.doneBody: Your password has been changed. You've been signed out everywhere else — log in again with your new password.
resetPassword.invalidBody: This password reset link is missing or malformed. Request a new one to continue.

adminLogin.title: Admin sign in
adminLogin.subtitle: Moderation, approvals, and platform management.
adminLogin.notAdmin: This account does not have admin access.

companyLogin.title: Company login
companyLogin.subtitle: Post jobs, offer partnerships, and search candidates.

register.title: Create your candidate profile
register.subtitle: One profile — works across jobs, startup partnerships, and community opportunities.
register.skillsPlaceholder: Type a skill and press enter
register.resumeDropPlaceholder: Drag & drop your resume, or click to browse

benefits.jobs: Apply to jobs directly and via listings we aggregate from other job boards.
benefits.partnerships: Not landing offers yet? Same profile applies you to startup partnerships.
benefits.community: Build soft skills through community roles while you keep searching.

companyRegister.title: Register your company
companyRegister.subtitle: Verified as per Indian company law before you can post jobs or offer partnerships.

certificate.label: Certificate of incorporation
certificate.hint: Reviewed by our compliance team within 24–48 hours

companyRegister.mcaNotice: All company data is verified against MCA (Ministry of Corporate Affairs) records before job or partnership postings go live, in accordance with Indian company law.
